reviews.review_description: My review keeps disappearing, so im gonna cut to the chase. This game is a waste of time and money. If you’re thinking of purchasing this game, don’t! There’s tons of AI slop in it, it’s buggy, and on top of all of that, it’s boring! The main sandbox has nothing to do. I absolutely do not recommend playing this.

reviews.review_title: No point, and doesn't deserve to be $10.
reviews.review_description: Why is this AI sloppy game $10? In my opinion the movement isn't that good, and the entire game feels like it was made in a day! The only thing I like is that it give you a challenge and that's basically it. My first experience was that none of the teleportals don't work, it took me 5 min just to get into the kitchen level.! I wold give it a higher rating if the creator actualy took some time to fix everything but for now, no it stays at 2 stars.

I was originally homeless and didn't have anything to play, I bought meta quest plus for the low price of $8, still didn't find anything that appealed to me. Until I came across this experience. The parkour and collection elements came across to me as amazing, after 15 hours of gameplay and beating all the levels numerous times, I have concluded this is peak fiction and I will never come to another experience like this in my life again.... 5 stars

Well, not very often but gorilla tag and I am Kai are definitely better. Are you able to make hamster simulator 𝓫𝓮𝓽𝓽𝓮𝓻.￼￼ 𝓘 𝓰𝓾𝓮𝓼𝓼 𝔀𝓮 𝔀𝓲𝓵𝓵 𝓼𝓮𝓮.  𝓦𝓔 𝙎𝙃𝘼𝙇𝙇 𝐒𝐄𝐄𝐄 𝐿𝒜𝒯𝐸𝑅 𝘖𝘕 ιƒ ＴＨＥＹ 𝒸ₐₙ 𝖬𝖠𝖪𝖤 𝙸𝚃 𝐵𝐸𝒯𝒯𝐸𝑅. 𝘽𝙔𝙀. 𝔉𝔲𝔒𝔯 𝘚𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘴.

If you’ve ever played I Am games, you would know that people whack you if you do something, but in this, the man goes to the side, and there is no sound when he whacks you! It’s really fun however instead of stopping when he can’t reach you to whack, he will stay mad until a minute has passed.  But there is a race mode, where you can run around a room and collect cherries. Overall, amazing game, and I hope this review convinced you to get this game. The money you pay is worth it for this!! Bye y’all!

I kept getting stuck cause it glitched. Fusterating trying to do anything when I'm stuck in a wall or a floor. Also be nice of there was a sit down version where you still use your hands to run but if you can move your head and ot will go in that direction or if you can use the joy stick to turn. It's a pain. Also, you can't get to the menu. Every time it glitched, I had to exeit out of the game just to get back in.

reviews.review_title: Its alright should have been free.
reviews.review_description:
If you have quest plus and its march 2026 then go ahead get the game if not then don't get the game. 

Gameplay - Alright
Movement - Awful 
Map - Fantastic. Its the best part of the game
Story - 10/10 this is actually the best part of the game. The ending where you learn that the hamster was schizophrenic and that die in horrific club doesn't actually exist was a great surprise.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your experience with the game was bad. Stay tuned as we are adding tons of new content including a brand new Sandbox level in the next few weeks. Please feel free to reach out to us at support@idzdigital.com with more suggestions on how we can improve the experience.  We hope to make your next experience much better.

reviews.review_description: When I first got this game. I thought it was TRASH! But after playing it again I found it was pretty decent. It's like I Am Cat and all the others but a little bit different! I'm glad they aren't doing the EXACT SAME THING! Now was it the best I Am... game? No. Was it enjoyable? YAH definitely. At the end of the day it really depends on who you ask if this was worth 10 dollars. I think maybe overpriced but still a good game none the less. Keep up the good work!
